utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details. The required details are: for each coverage item, the type of insurance and costs; for total_budget, a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. In the final plan: health_coverage includes a plan name and both monthly and annual costs, fulfilling costs requirement though not explicit feature details; property_coverage includes a plan name and monthly/annual costs; travel_coverage includes a plan name and monthly/annual costs; additional_services includes a description and monthly/annual costs; total_budget includes total monthly and annual costs (plus savings, which are extra). All items include the required cost details, satisfying the format’s requirement.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific plans by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical + Mental) for health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage for property, and InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel. We need to match each to the ground-truth ratings. In the ground-truth: LifeFirst Standard Plan has rating 8 for both physical and mental health; since the plan is consolidated as Physical + Mental, we map to the LifeFirst Standard Plan rating of 8. PrimeHome Premium Coverage has rating 10 under home_content. InsurePlus Standard Plan under travel_insurance has rating 7. Additional services are described as consolidated with no specific plan names to map, so no ratings applied.
